# Pinporium

> Pinporium is a mobile app for enamel pin collectors: vault your collection, browse Discover, track ISOs and grails, trade in-app, earn achievements, and contribute to a shared pin catalog.

- Website: https://pinporium.app
- Changelog: https://pinporium.app/changelog
- Beta: Apply at https://pinporium.app (iOS via TestFlight, Android via Google Play internal testing after approval)
- Support: help@pinporium.app
- Privacy: https://pinporium.app/privacy
- Terms: https://pinporium.app/terms

## Product

- Platforms: iOS and Android (beta)
- Audience: Enamel pin collectors (artist pins, licensed pins, limited editions, chases, convention pickups)
- Core features: Collection vault, pin boards, shared catalog, Discover browse/search, The Hunt (ISO/DISO/Grail), in-app trades, achievements and collector score, 3D pin viewer from photos

## Optional

For release history, see /changelog.
